models.name: GPT Image 2 (Nio 4K)
models.description: High-quality image generation model for text-to-image and image-to-image workflows.

params_schema.label: Size
params_schema.description: Output image size. Only backend-configured presets are supported.

params_schema.label: Quality
params_schema.description: Generation quality.

params_schema.label: Format
params_schema.description: Output file format.

params_schema.label: Images
params_schema.description: Number of images to generate.

params_schema.label: Background
params_schema.description: Background handling. Transparent background is not supported.

params_schema.label: Compression
params_schema.description: JPEG/WEBP compression level. Only used when output_format is jpeg or webp.

models.name: Seedance2.0 720P/1080P
models.description: Seedance 2.0 high-quality 720p reference video generation model.

params_schema.label: Duration
params_schema.description: Video duration.

params_schema.label: Aspect Ratio
params_schema.description: Video aspect ratio.

params_schema.label: Resolution
params_schema.description: Output resolution.

params_schema.label: Extra Image URLs
params_schema.description: Optional comma-separated reference image URLs, up to 9. Prompt can reference @Image1 through @Image9.

params_schema.label: Extra Video URLs
params_schema.description: Optional comma-separated reference video URLs, up to 3. Prompt can reference @Video1 through @Video3.

params_schema.label: Extra Audio URLs
params_schema.description: Optional comma-separated reference audio URLs, up to 3. Prompt can reference @Audio1 through @Audio3.

models.name: Seedance-2.0 720P
models.description: Shishi video model for image-guided SD2 creative video generation. Configured but disabled by default until production validation is complete.

params_schema.label: Duration
params_schema.description: Video duration.

params_schema.label: Aspect Ratio
params_schema.description: Video aspect ratio.

params_schema.label: Resolution
params_schema.description: Output resolution.

models.name: GEMINI Omni Flash 10s
models.description: NewToken VEO Omni Flash video model. Supports text-to-video and up to 6 reference images through Ingredients_images.

params_schema.label: Duration
params_schema.description: Video duration. NewToken VEO requires 10 seconds.

params_schema.label: Aspect Ratio
params_schema.description: Video aspect ratio.

models.name: Video Pro 720p
models.description: High-quality 720p video generation model via the NewAPI-compatible /v1/videos asynchronous interface. Supports text prompts plus optional image, video, and audio reference URLs.

params_schema.label: Duration
params_schema.description: Video duration in seconds. Supported range: 4–15 seconds.

params_schema.label: Aspect Ratio
params_schema.description: Video aspect ratio.

params_schema.label: Main Image URL
params_schema.description: Optional main reference image HTTPS URL.

params_schema.label: Extra Image URLs
params_schema.description: Optional comma-separated reference image URLs, up to 9. Prompt can reference @Image1 through @Image9.

params_schema.label: Extra Video URLs
params_schema.description: Optional comma-separated reference video URLs, up to 3. Prompt can reference @Video1 through @Video3.

params_schema.label: Extra Audio URLs
params_schema.description: Optional comma-separated reference audio URLs, up to 3. Prompt can reference @Audio1 through @Audio3.

models.name: Seedance 2.0 Fast

params_schema.description: Video duration in seconds.

params_schema.description: Video aspect ratio.

params_schema.label: Resolution
params_schema.description: Output resolution.

models.name: Seedance 2.0 15s

params_schema.label: Size
params_schema.description: Sora-compatible output size.

params_schema.label: Resolution
params_schema.description: Display resolution preset.

models.name: Jimeng Seedance 2.0 Mini
models.description: Low-cost 720p Seedance 2.0 Mini video generation via jimeng.dimensio.cn /v1/videos/generations.

params_schema.label: Duration
params_schema.description: Video duration in seconds. Seedance 2.0 supports 4–15 seconds.

params_schema.label: Aspect Ratio
params_schema.description: Video aspect ratio.

params_schema.label: Resolution
params_schema.description: Output resolution.

params_schema.label: Function Mode
params_schema.description: Jimeng Dimensio reference mode. Default omni_reference is recommended for text/image/video reference generation.

params_schema.label: Reference Image URLs
params_schema.description: Optional public reference image URLs. Use an array in API requests, up to 9 images. Two images are treated as first and last frames by default.

7 天基础会员特权，适合短期集中创作

announcements.title: Gemini omni 由于官方服务器不稳定，请波动后使用
announcements.body: Gemini omni 由于官方服务器不稳定，请波动后使用  可先使用sora seedance 2.0 等其他渠道制作视频
